PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kurt Huysentruyt for Petitioner.

The Court noted issue regarding signatures not looking the same. Mr. Huysentruyt stated they look the same to him and that not all signatures will look identical to one another. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate set for April 21, 2019 at 9:00am in dept 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
